entries.notes: The rain actually helped today - something about the cooler air made the congestion less awful.
Started getting a headache during the commute. Probably the construction noise. Took ibuprofen when I got to the office.
Allergy season is hitting hard this week. Took an antihistamine around noon and felt better within the hour.
Walking meeting today instead of sitting in the conference room. Felt so much better afterwards, both mentally and physically.
Pro tip: don't exist so aggressively on 4 hours of sleep.
Achievement unlocked: vertical for 8 consecutive hours.
Hot take: mornings are overrated.
Nap didn't fix it but it didn't hurt either.

Somewhere between fine and send help.
